title: Connect your Oura data
subtitle: View your sleep, readiness and activity without a subscription

steps.heading: How to import your data
steps.step2: Log in with your Oura credentials
steps.step4: Wait for the confirmation email (up to 2.5 hours)
steps.step5: Download the ZIP file to your device

legal: Your data never leaves your device. This app has no server and no analytics.

eviction.noZip: Your data was cleared by iOS. Import your ZIP to restore it.
